business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Prior insurance history for 2024 policy year

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all subcontractors
Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
concerns: Presence of swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities
EV charging stations installed on the premises
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 1 claim reported in 2024, 0 claims in 2023, and 1 claim in 2022. No policy cancellations in the past 3 years.
